title: Economies with high inequality appear first in this ranked tile view
subtitle: Latest Gini category and value for each economy; equal-area tiles are not a geographic map
source: Key Inequality Indicators, Poverty and Inequality Platform (version March 2026).
visdescription: A ranked equal-area tile grid groups economies into high, moderate, and low Gini categories. It does not encode geographic location or regional concentration.

limitations.geometry: The bundled CSV has ISO codes, Gini values, and categories but no country geometry or region field. The renderer is a ranked tile grid and cannot substantiate the title's geographic-concentration claim on its own.
